channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ensuring variety in today’s AI-native era
item.description: The dangers of having our AI future built by only a select few

item.title: With the World Cup looming, there’s still no clear replacement for sports Twitter
item.description: Three years ago, when the women's World Cup kicked off in Australia and New Zealand, my social feeds were in a strange place. Twitter had just transformed into X, newcomer Threads was seemingly ascendant, and places like Bluesky had yet to garner much momentum. It left me with an odd, and admittedly silly, dilemma: I […]

item.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
item.description: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

item.title: J’ai transformé une liseuse en tableau de bord pour ma maison connectée, sans écrire une ligne de code
item.description: Construire ses tableaux de bord à la main, puis les maintenir, c'est le second mur de Home Assistant, celui qui décourage juste après l'installation. Je les ai dictés au lieu de les coder, et je me suis offert un écran sur mesure pour chaque pièce.

item.title: Comment calibrer et entretenir votre imprimante 3D ?
item.description: Vous venez d'acquérir une imprimante 3D flambant neuve et vous ne savez pas comment vous en occuper ? Voici nos conseils pour bien démarrer et entretenir votre imprimante.

item.title: Mint Mobile's huge new Galaxy S26 Ultra deal cuts $500 off without the usual trade-in — a new record-low on 'the best Android phone ever'
item.description: Mint Mobile's deal on the Galaxy S26 Ultra is a record-low and it's selling quickly at the well-known carrier.

item.title: Deezer détecte la musique générée par IA sur tous les services de streaming
item.description: La plate-forme française de diffusion de musique en streaming vient d’annoncer l’arrivée d’un nouvel outil pour détecter si une musique a été générée par intelligence artificielle. Bonne nouvelle, ce détecteur de musique IA pourra être utilisé sur les plates-formes concurrentes.

item.title: Intel claims its Wildcat Lake notebooks 'reimagine mainstream laptops' — and are ready to take on the MacBook Neo
item.description: After Intel's explanation of how it's ensuring Wildcat Lake is more affordable, I'm now more excited to see these rivals for the MacBook Neo.

item.title: Tesla : après le Danemark, la Belgique s’ouvre à son tour à la conduite autonome
item.description: La Belgique vient d’autoriser le FSD de Tesla sur ses routes. L’effet domino se confirme ; d’autres pays pourraient bientôt suivre le pas.

item.title: Votre Galaxy S25 récupère enfin trois fonctions IA réservées au Galaxy S26
item.description: Samsung déploie une mise à jour de juin pour les Galaxy S25 qui ajoute des fonctions IA jusque-là réservées aux Galaxy S26. Concrètement : le tri et le résumé automatique des notifications débarquent enfin sur les Galaxy S25.

item.title: Not all AIs are equal so CIOs need to prioritize actions when assessing risks
item.description: As AI agents proliferate, CIOs need smarter identity governance and risk-based security controls.

item.title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
item.description: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.

item.title: How to watch World Cup 2026 from anywhere — it's *FREE*
item.description: We've found a way you can stream the 2026 World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Mexico vs South Africa LIVE: Watch World Cup 2026 opener, free streams, build-up
item.description: Here's how to watch Mexico vs South Africa from anywhere as the World Cup begins in Mexico City.

item.title: Stranger than Heaven hands-on: Harder than Yakuza?
item.description: Set across mid-twentieth century Japan, RGG's latest has an entirely new fighting system.

item.title: Cette tour gaming Acer prête à l’emploi avec RTX 5080 et Core Ultra 7 en promo à -300 € échappe à la flambée des prix
item.description: Cette tour Acer Predator Orion 5000 est un PC de bureau costaud avec une forte aspiration gaming que vous retrouvez en promo à 2 799 euros au lieu de 3 099 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Trump Phone unmasked as a 'gold-painted HTC U24 Pro' in iFixit teardown — with little sign of the built-in 'American values'
item.description: The T1 by Trump Mobile is seemingly almost identical to the HTC U24 Pro, with just a few small differences.

item.title: Qui a dit que les VTT électriques n’étaient pas taillés pour le bikepacking ? Voici l’ultra polyvalent Specialized Levo 4 X
item.description: En intégrant deux porte-bagages avant et arrière cumulant 22 kg de charge maximale, ainsi qu’un rangement de cadre avec sacoche, le Specialized Levo 4 X se veut aussi performant en VTTAE que pratique en bikepacking.

item.title: I'm glad Apple isn't hyping up agentic AI (yet)
item.description: Apple is more focused on delivering usable features with Siri AI, instead of hyping up agentic AI. That's a good thing.

item.title: Artemis III's life support: How a spacesuit keeps astronauts alive on the moon
item.description: The spaceman wears Prada.

item.title: Oracle stock is tumbling on cloud miss and costly data center plans: What it means for the AI bubble debate
item.description: The software giant beat Wall Street’s estimates on revenue, but investors appear to be concerned about its plans to raise $40 billion. Oracle Corporation reported increased revenue of 21% year-over-year (YOY) for its fiscal fourth quarter, but it wasn’t enough to please stockholders.

item.title: South Korea hits Coupang with $400M+ fine for data breach that affected millions
item.description: South Korean authorities issued the record-breaking fine following a data breach that affected over 30 million customers.

item.title: The key steps that will enable organizations to scale Physical AI
item.description: What it takes to move intelligent systems from pilot success to production-scale reality.

item.title: iOS 27’s new Siri AI gesture could cause mass confusion by breaking with 15 years of iPhone tradition — but I’m confident I’ll adapt
item.description: iOS 27 comes with a new gesture for Siri AI that could cause problems for your muscle memory.

item.title: Ditch the boring office furniture: Save 23% on Blacklyte's 'bold standing desk' blending a gamer style and pro-grade features for the home office — but the Prime Day sale ends soon
item.description: We loved testing this heavy-duty desk built for work and play.

item.title: Are we finally starting to trust agents? New report claims 74% 'trust a personal AI agent more than their best friend'
item.description: One in 10 consumers already trust AI agents to complete transactions without their approval as trust continues to rise.

item.title: The Trump Phone is mostly a rebranded HTC phone
item.description: Now that the Trump Mobile T1 phone is available for purchase, it's become apparent that it's actually a rebranded variant of the HTC U24 Pro.

item.title: Guinness World Record smashed by QR code pixel just 50nm - 2500 sq nanometer size is smaller than COVID-19 virus, needs electron microscope to read it
item.description: Researchers have just created the world smallest scannable QR code, and its only about 50 atoms wide

item.title: Here's the real reason Apple made such a big deal of Screen Time and Child Safety at WWDC 2026, and why it may be a very good thing
item.description: We got an up-close look at the new, richer, and more customizable Apple Child Safety and Screen Time tools that could help parents get a grip on their children's digital lives.

item.title: Cash App’s launching a phone service
item.description: Cash App's AT&T-based MVNO will offer an unlimited 5G data plan for $40 per month including taxes and fees. The new mobile service is powered by Gigs, the same firm behind the Klarna mobile service that launched last year with the same pricing and is "rolling out to select users, with broader availability planned in […]

item.title: Toy Story 5 director 'never planned' for Jessie to be the new Pixar movie's main character — but says her past was 'always something I wanted to address'
item.description: Andrew Stanton reveals why Jessie is the lead of the latest Toy Story movie instead of Buzz and Woody.

item.title: Rhythm Heaven Groove is on track to become my favorite Nintendo Switch release of 2026
item.description: We go hands-on with the incredibly charming music action of Rhythm Heaven Groove.

item.title: Only Murders in the Building season 6: guest stars, confirmed cast and everything we know so far about the Hulu and Disney+ show's London return
item.description: Our murder-solving trio are heading across the pond to London in Only Murders in the Building season 6. Here's what we can expect, from confirmed guest stars to release window.

item.title: Strava subscribers just saved themselves another sub to Komoot or AllTrails — as the freemium app debuts a new suite of hiking tools that 'spans every stage of the outdoor experience', including vital off-route alerts
item.description: The new Strava features help premium subscribers plan routes, ensure they stick to the trail, and aid in sharing activities afterwards.

item.title: Former Fitbit executive unveils new necklace that tracks UV exposure
item.description: The Gem necklace can track your UV exposure.

item.title: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis is a vivid, high-pace remake of a classic
item.description: Lara get your gun(s).

item.title: macOS 27 : ces 3 nouveautés secrètes qui préparent l’arrivée du MacBook Ultra
item.description: La bêta de macOS 27 Golden Gate recèle trois indices majeurs confirmant le développement secret du MacBook Ultra tactile avec Dynamic Island.

item.title: ‘Extreme concern’: 2 big reasons why the SpaceX IPO is worrying some stock market watchers
item.description: With Elon Musk’s space company expected to list its shares tomorrow, one prominent banking committee member is calling for a pause. SpaceX’s initial public offering is just one day away, and it is widely expected to be the largest on record.

item.title: Knicks make record-breaking comeback from 29 points down, beating Spurs 107-106
item.description: It seemed impossible, but the Knicks came roaring back after halftime. A record-breaking comeback, capped off by what could go down as a legendary play.The long road back to the top of the NBA is almost complete for the New York Knicks, and the step they took Wednesday night was unforgettable.The Knicks came from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 in Game 4 of the finals on OG Anunoby’s tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining.“That has to be the most iconic shot in the history of New York basketball,” Knicks coach Mik...
